name: playwright-automation-framework
description: Enterprise-grade Playwright + TypeScript test automation framework with POM, parallel execution, and CI/CD integration
author: Yousuf Waqar <yousufwaqar7@gmail.com>

scripts.test: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS="--import tsx" npx playwright test --grep-invert @external
scripts.test:headed: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS="--import tsx" npx playwright test --headed --grep-invert @external
scripts.test:chrome: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS="--import tsx" npx playwright test --project=chromium --grep-invert @external
scripts.test:firefox: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS="--import tsx" npx playwright test --project=firefox --grep-invert @external
scripts.test:webkit: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS="--import tsx" npx playwright test --project=webkit --grep-invert @external
scripts.test:api: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS="--import tsx" npx playwright test tests/api/
scripts.test:smoke: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS="--import tsx" npx playwright test --grep @smoke --grep-invert @external
scripts.test:regression: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS="--import tsx" npx playwright test --grep @regression --grep-invert @external
scripts.test:external: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS="--import tsx" npx playwright test --grep @external
scripts.test:saucedemo: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS="--import tsx" npx playwright test --grep @saucedemo
scripts.test:theinternet: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS="--import tsx" npx playwright test --grep @theinternet
scripts.test:api:external: cross-env NODE_OPTIONS="--import tsx" npx playwright test tests/external/api/
